name: Village Stage 01
description: Build Main Building to level 10 at square 26. Initial custom template.

stages.name: Stage 1 - Main Building to 10 (Square 26)
stages.notes: Foundation stage. Main Building 10 unlocks most mid-game buildings.

stages.name: Stage 4 - Main Building to 15 (Square 26)
stages.notes: Upgrade Main Building to level 15 for advanced buildings.

stages.name: Stage 5 - Warehouse Level 3
stages.notes: Upgrade Warehouse in slot 19 to level 3.

stages.name: Stage 6 - Granary Level 3
stages.notes: Upgrade Granary in slot 24 to level 3.

stages.name: Stage 7 - Marketplace Level 1 (Square 33)
stages.notes: Build Marketplace in slot 33 to level 1.

stages.name: Stage 8 - Rally Point Level 1
stages.notes: Build Rally Point in slot 39 to level 1.

stages.name: Stage 9 - Barracks Level 3 (Square 37)
stages.notes: Build Barracks in slot 37 to level 3.

stages.name: Stage 10 - Warehouse and Granary to 5
stages.notes: Upgrade Warehouse and Granary to level 5.

stages.name: Stage 11 - Main Building to 20 (Square 26)
stages.notes: Upgrade Main Building in slot 26 to level 20.

stages.name: Stage 12 - Marketplace Level 8 (Square 33)
stages.notes: Upgrade Marketplace in slot 33 to level 8.

stages.name: Stage 13 - Warehouse and Granary to 8
stages.notes: Upgrade Warehouse and Granary to level 8.

stages.name: Stage 14 - Academy Level 10 (Square 32)
stages.notes: Build Academy in slot 32 to level 10.

stages.name: Stage 15 - Town Hall Level 1 (Square 30)
stages.notes: Build Town Hall in slot 30 to level 1.

stages.name: Stage 16 - Blacksmith Level 3 (Square 28)
stages.notes: Build Blacksmith in slot 28 to level 3.

stages.name: Stage 17 - Stable Level 3 (Square 38)
stages.notes: Build Stable in slot 38 to level 3.
